Home.metaTitle: Instrumental cosmetology & beauty care in Helsinki
Home.metaDescription: Mone Beauty Clinic — an aesthetic-medicine clinic in Helsinki: endospheres therapy, laser, RF lifting, trichology, facial & body care, and AROSHA products.

endospheres.title: Endospheres therapy
endospheres.description: An innovative procedure that utilizes a unique device based on radiofrequency and vacuum technology. This treatment helps improve the skin, reduce cellulite, increase skin firmness and tone, and enhance microcirculation.

arosha.title: Arosha Boost
arosha.description: AROSHA has developed intensive products and programs that suit every customer's requirements. Depending on the desired result, the clinic team will help you choose the right protocol.

facial.title: Facial treatments
facial.description: At our salon, we use the most effective hardware and cosmetic procedures for the face to highlight your natural beauty and give your skin a healthy, radiant appearance.

Home.aroshaIntro: AROSHA is the European leader in the worldwide number of body products sold in the area. The AROSHA brand is characterized by traditionally high Italian quality, ease of use and solves the most complex problems, with results that are visible after a short period of use.

byAppointment.title: By appointment
byAppointment.desc: Book a time that suits you — Mon–Sun by agreement.

hero.heading: Next-Generation Aesthetic Medicine
hero.lead: A comprehensive approach to beauty, skin health, and the natural harmony of face, body, and hair.

approach.title: Personal approach
approach.body: Care planned around every individual visit

items.body: Receive your confirmation and meet the clinic team at the agreed time.

services.heading: Care for face, body and hair

products.heading: Professional care, continued at home

booking.heading: Begin with one simple choice
booking.lead: Select a service here and continue directly to the clinic's live appointment times.

contact.heading: A calm, personal clinic in Helsinki
contact.lead: Mone Beauty Clinic brings together aesthetic medicine, advanced technologies, and attentive care. Visits are arranged by appointment.

hero.title: Next-generation aesthetic medicine.
hero.lead: A comprehensive approach to beauty, skin health, and the natural harmony of face, body, and hair. Mone is a licensed medical clinic offering safe, evidence-based procedures and personalized treatment plans.
hero.imageAlt: A clinician performing a treatment at Mone Beauty Clinic

standard.title: Our standard of care
standard.lead: Every treatment is planned and performed to medical standards, following a defined clinical pathway from first consultation to ongoing maintenance.

consultation.title: Consultation
consultation.body: A structured medical consultation to review history, concerns, and expectations.

diagnosis.title: Diagnosis
diagnosis.body: Instrumental skin and scalp analysis to establish an accurate baseline.

plan.title: Treatment plan
plan.body: A written plan defining procedures, their sequence, and the expected timeline.

care.title: Care
care.body: Professional home care and scheduled follow-up to maintain results.

treatments.title: Clinical services
treatments.lead: Eight treatment categories, each planned around a diagnosis. Select a treatment to request an appointment, or read the full protocol.

facial.name: Facial treatments
facial.description: Diagnostic-led facials for skin health and barrier repair.

body.name: Body treatments
body.description: Targeted body programs for contour, tone, and circulation.

endospheres.name: Endospheres therapy
endospheres.description: Compressive microvibration for lymphatic drainage and firmness.

laser.name: Laser hair removal
laser.description: Medical diode laser for permanent hair reduction.

trichology.name: Trichology care
trichology.description: Scalp and hair diagnostics with clinical treatment protocols.

brows.name: Eyebrow & eyelash treatments
brows.description: Precision brow and lash shaping and tinting.

packages.name: Service packages
packages.description: Combined treatment courses planned across sessions.

consultation.name: Medical consultation
consultation.description: Dedicated diagnostic consultation with a clinician. [CLINIC TO PROVIDE]

technology.title: Clinical technologies
technology.lead: The devices behind our treatments. Each is a medical-grade system, operated by trained clinicians and selected for documented results.

endospheres.name: Endospheres Therapy
endospheres.body: Compressive microvibration delivered through a matrix of rotating spheres to support drainage and skin tone.

laser.name: Laser Hair Removal
laser.body: A medical diode laser targeting the hair follicle across all treatable body areas.

rf.name: Microneedle RF Lifting
rf.body: Insulated microneedles deliver radiofrequency into the dermis to stimulate collagen.

trichology.name: Trichology
trichology.body: Instrumental scalp analysis guiding targeted hair and scalp treatment protocols.

products.title: Professional products
products.lead: Professional formulations dispensed as part of your treatment plan. Two clinical lines continue your results between appointments.
products.note: Dispensed as part of your treatment plan.

booking.title: Book a consultation
booking.lead: Begin with a consultation. We review your history and concerns, examine the area, and prepare a written treatment plan.
booking.intro: Appointments are arranged by agreement. Choose a treatment and a preferred date, and we will confirm your time by email.
booking.gdpr: Your information is processed confidentially in accordance with GDPR and used only to arrange your appointment.
booking.notesPlaceholder: Anything we should know before your consultation.

footer.about: A licensed medical clinic in Helsinki for aesthetic medicine, skin, body, and hair.

Staff.heading: Schedule
Staff.intro: Manage open slots, closed times, and the day’s appointments. Authentication and role gating are added in the next phase.

privacyBody: Online-store payments are processed by Stripe. Mone Beauty Clinic stores the order, payment status, fulfilment choice, and delivery address where needed, but never stores complete card details.

Mone Beauty Clinic processes personal data to provide appointments, product orders, customer support, CRM follow-up, and legally required administration. Typical data includes name, phone, email, booking/order details, consent records, and messages you choose to send.
Health-related notes, contraindications, and treatment comments are treated as special-category data. Access is role-restricted and sensitive access is audited in the admin system.

Data is processed on the basis of appointment/order performance, legal obligations, consent, and legitimate interest in safe clinic operations. Marketing communication is used only where consent is recorded.
You can request access, export, correction, or erasure of your data by contacting info@monebeauty.fi. Some accounting or appointment records may need to be retained where required by law.
The clinic uses EU-oriented hosting and limits third-party processing. Analytics cookies load only after cookie consent.
termsBody: The website provides information, booking, product order requests, and contact channels for Mone Beauty Clinic. Content is informational and does not replace personal consultation with a qualified professional.
Appointments are subject to clinic confirmation and availability. If you arrive late, cancel late, or miss an appointment, the clinic's cancellation rules may apply.

Online-store purchases are charged securely through Stripe. Physical goods are collected from the clinic or delivered within Finland; digital voucher codes are delivered by email after confirmed payment. Appointment bookings are paid at the clinic and are never charged through Stripe.
Do not misuse the website, attempt unauthorized access, or submit false information. Internal admin and staff areas are restricted to authorized users only.
The clinic may update these terms as services, legal requirements, or website features change.
cookiesBody: Essential cookies and local storage are used for basic website functions such as cart state, language-aware navigation, session security, and cookie consent choices.
Analytics cookies are optional. Google Analytics is loaded only after you accept analytics cookies in the cookie banner.
You can decline analytics cookies and continue using the website. You can reset your choice by clearing this site's browser storage.
Chat transcripts are stored only when you give GDPR consent in the chat widget.
